title: DO-IT BI Power BI Connector

posts.author: MaLe1337 (Maximilian Lehmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I am using the DO-IT BI Connector to get Data into Power BI via the Web Connector in Power BI.
The Connection works but I dont get any actual Data.
I only receive three columsn called value.name, value.kind and value.url.
Just 11 lines filled with “Workspace”, “Boardinfo”, “Items” and such, but no real data.
Does anyone know how to fix this?
Kind Regards,
Max

posts.author: AnnaO (Anna Odrynska)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Max,

Feel free to try our app: monday.com: Apps Marketplace
You will definitely got your data visualized. In case you face any issues, please reach out to the support team: support@alpha-serve.com

All the best,
Anna
